rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee in component type annexes; use assign only in implementation annexes for output features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model exactly as named; do not invent or copy external identifiers.
generic_rules: Limit contract clauses to the semantic scope of the owning component; do not cross type/implementation boundaries.
Express guarantees as relations between visible inputs and outputs; avoid internal subcomponent paths in type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use annex agree {** ... **}; for all AGREE content; declare constants and equations with const and eq.
Ensure all variables in expressions are declared features or constants visible in the current scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation annexes; use assign for implementation-level bindings only.
irrelevant_topics: assume/guarantee placement strategy for target names
